name: worktrees
description: Make a repository worktree-ready: per-worktree isolation plus an enforcement guard that protects the main checkout.

interface.shortDescription: Worktree isolation and a main-checkout enforcement guard.
interface.longDescription: Use Worktrees when Codex needs to make a repository safe for isolated worktree-based development. The setup skill guides project-specific filesystem, secret, cache, port, service, lifecycle, and enforcement choices, while the bundled scripts provide reusable guard and port-allocation building blocks.
defaultPrompt: Make this repository worktree-ready and install the main-checkout guard.
Design per-worktree isolation for this project and generate the bootstrap plan.
